title: Release Perf Gate Follow-up
findings: 发现 1 个新 distinct issue：tag release 工作流复用 build/typecheck/lint/coverage/NO_COLOR gate，但漏跑普通 CI 已启用的 perf p95 gate，发布可绕过 CLI/hook 冷启动性能门禁。
issues_found: [{"title":"Release workflow omits the CI perf benchmark gate before publish","severity":"medium","description":"The normal CI validate job runs scripts/perf-benchmark.mjs as a CLI + hook cold-start p95 gate and fails on budget breaches, but the tag-triggered release workflow stops after coverage, protected-token lint, and NO_COLOR snapshots before allowing publish. A direct release tag can therefore publish packages without the same performance gate, even though the benchmark script is an explicit failing gate. This is distinct from ISS-20260609-030: the fixture may be weak, but release.yml does not run the gate at all.","location":".github/workflows/release.yml:51","fix_direction":"Add the same perf benchmark step used in .github/workflows/ci.yml before the release ci job completes, preferably uploading perf-report.json on always(); keep the gate command centralized so CI and release cannot drift.","affected_components":[".github/workflows/release.yml",".github/workflows/ci.yml","scripts/perf-benchmark.mjs","release publish gate"],"tags":["release-perf-gates","perf-gate","release-workflow","ci-drift"]}]
